text.title: Pricing Experiment Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example: indie SaaS bumps Solo plan $19→$29 with 12-month grandfather window.

section.title: Context
section.p: Indie SaaS on Stripe with 312 active Solo subscriptions at $19/mo. Founder wants to test a $29 price for new signups while protecting existing customers for 12 months. Currency: USD only. Tax: EU VAT inclusive.

section.title: Plan (Step 2)
section.code: { "experiment_id": "exp-2026-q2-pricing", "start_date": "2026-06-01", "end_date": "2026-07-30", "duration_days": 60, "variant_old": {"stripe_price_id": "price_old_19"}, "variant_new": {"stripe_price_id": "price_new_29"}, "audience": "new_signups_only", "exposure_rule": "random 50/50 by signup-id hash mod 2", "success_metric_primary": "trial_to_paid_conversion_pct", "success_metric_threshold": 0.18, "significance_target": "p<0.05", "guardrail_metrics": ["refund_rate", "dispute_rate", "support_ticket_rate"], "grandfathering": { "audience": "all subs active before 2026-06-01", "mechanism": "100% off coupon on price_new_29", "stripe_coupon_id": "grandfather_q2_2026", "window_months": 12 }, "currencies_in_test": ["usd"], "tax_behavior": "exclusive" }

section.title: Pre-flight (Step 5)
section.p: scripts/stripe-pre-flight.py confirms: price_new_29 exists, price_old_19 active, grandfather_q2_2026 attached to all 312 existing customers, zero orphan subs, no test-mode artefacts. passed_at = 2026-05-28T09:00:00Z (4 days before start). Within the 7-day window.

list.item: Day 30: trial_to_paid_new = 0.21, trial_to_paid_old = 0.17. Refund_rate steady at 1.1%. Dispute_rate steady at 0.2%. No guardrail breach.
Day 45: founder briefly considers extending — termination rule check: significance not yet reached but sample at 78% of plan. Continue, no extension yet.
Day 60: trial_to_paid_new = 0.21 (n=140), trial_to_paid_old = 0.17 (n=138). z-test p = 0.043 → significance reached.

section.title: Decision Memo (Step 7)
section.p: decision = adopt_new. metric_readouts captured. qualitative_signals: "no refund spike, 2 dispute tickets (baseline). Support inbox unchanged." next_action: "Move all new signups to price_new_29 on 2026-08-01. Maintain grandfather coupon for 12 months." Customer announcement sent same day: "We rolled out a new Solo plan at $29/mo for new accounts. If you signed up before 2026-06-01 you are on the original $19 price for 12 more months. Thanks for being early."

text.example: 312 active subs (≥30) → preconditions met → Plan committed → grandfather coupon pinned → pre-flight green → run with daily guardrails → significance reached at day 60 → Decision Memo within 48h → adopt_new; APPROVE via run-the-checklist.
